<sad>No animals to care for today. Means none need saying goodbye, at least.</sad>
<nervous>Could you... could you place a hook? I can't do the work without it.</nervous>
<nervous>A basin would help. I don't like the mess when there isn't one.</nervous>
sensitive.dialogue.chat.village_life.but: <happy>Our butcher treats the animals with respect. It matters, that.</happy>
sensitive.dialogue.chat.village_life.sla: <sad>I try not to think about the slaughterhouse. It feels important work, but... hard.</sad>
sensitive.dialogue.chat.village_life.smo: <happy>The smokehouse reminds me of my grandmother's cooking. Warm and good.</happy>
sensitive.dialogue.main/2: <happy>Hi... I hope you're doing well today.</happy>
sensitive.dialogue.main/7: <nervous>Oh, speaking of %supporter%, I heard they had a little encounter with a zombie... It was quite... um, interesting.</nervous> But, um, never mind that, <scared>I saw a zombie that kind of reminded me of %supporter% earlier... it was, um, quite strange.</scared>
sensitive.dialogue.rumors.lore/2: <scared>Oh, dear friend, we were once besieged by those dreadful Cyberdemons. They dared to infiltrate our peaceful realm through ghastly Portals.</scared> <happy>But thanks to the heroics of Sirben and the valiant Luke, they were swiftly vanquished, halting the invasion in its tracks.</happy>
sensitive.dialogue.rumors.lore/3: <whisper>Whispers have reached my ears that 2DA50, entangled in the enigma of the Ancient Builder's disappearance, embarked on a treacherous journey to the Far Lands.</whisper> <sad>Alas, no tidings of their fate have ever graced our ears since.</sad>
sensitive.dialogue.rumors.lore/5: <sad>Once upon a time, a majestic race of builders roamed our lands, their skills unmatched and their creations awe-inspiring. However, as the sands of time shifted, they vanished without a trace, leaving behind only echoes of their once-great existence.</sad>
sensitive.dialogue.first.generic/1: <happy>Greetings, stranger! Your presence here brings a sense of novelty and excitement to our humble village.</happy>
sensitive.dialogue.first.generic/2: <happy>Ah, a newcomer! How delightful!</happy> Your arrival injects a breath of fresh air into our monotonous routine.
sensitive.dialogue.first.generic/5: <happy>It feels like ages since we've had the pleasure of hosting a traveler.</happy> Make yourself at home, dear wanderer!
sensitive.dialogue.first.generic/6: <happy>Why, hello there! The sight of a new face fills me with joy!</happy> Welcome to our village, dear newcomer.
sensitive.dialogue.first.settling/1: <happy>How wonderful it is to behold another visage gracing our humble village!</happy>
sensitive.dialogue.first.settling/2: <happy>Ah, a warm greeting to you, dear newcomer!</happy> Welcome to our little haven!
sensitive.dialogue.first.settling/4: <excited>Oh, you've chosen to stay? How utterly splendid!</excited> Our village shall benefit greatly from your presence!
sensitive.dialogue.first.spent_night.fai: <sad>Oh, alas! Our humble village lacks the wondrous art of inn construction.</sad> Please forgive our incompetence!
<sad>I deeply regret to inform you that our village, regrettably, does not possess an inn.</sad> I offer my sincerest apologies for this inconvenience!

<sad>Ah, fellow traveler, it pains me to say that our village cannot provide you with the sanctuary of an inn.</sad> Perhaps, if you venture forth, you may stumble upon a more hospitable abode in another village.
sensitive.dialogue.hug.success/1: <happy>Wow, I can't believe it's been ages since we last met!</happy>
sensitive.dialogue.hug.success/2: <happy>I truly appreciate your kind gesture, it means more to me than you can imagine.</happy>
sensitive.dialogue.hug.success/3: <sad>Amidst a rather gloomy day,</sad> <happy>your hug managed to bring a glimmer of light into my life.</happy>
sensitive.dialogue.hug.success/4: <happy>Your embrace is like the softness of a cloud, it truly brings me comfort.</happy>
sensitive.dialogue.hug.success/5: <excited>Oh, how delightful!</excited> <happy>Your hug fills me with warmth and gratitude. Allow me to reciprocate this affection!</happy>
sensitive.dialogue.hug.success/6: <happy>Goodness gracious, your embrace is like a cozy fireplace on a chilly winter night. You radiate such wonderful warmth!</happy>
sensitive.dialogue.hug.fail/3: <nervous>I'm sorry, but I'm not really comfortable with hugs.</nervous>
sensitive.dialogue.hug.fail/4: <sad>Remember when you compared me to a caveman? Yeah, I'll have to decline.</sad>
sensitive.dialogue.hug.fail/5: <sad>Honestly, considering how you treated me, I don't think you deserve a hug.</sad>
sensitive.dialogue.hug.fail/6: <scared>Ugh, please keep your germs to yourself!</scared> I'm not a fan of physical contact.
sensitive.dialogue.hug.fail/7: <nervous>Oh, um, well... thank you, I suppose?</nervous> I'm not quite sure how to react.
sensitive.dialogue.kiss.success/1: <flirty>This moment is so beautiful, I wish it could go on forever.</flirty>
sensitive.dialogue.kiss.success/2: <flirty>I believe my heart is filled with love for you...</flirty>
sensitive.dialogue.kiss.success/3: <flirty>Mmm, this kiss is as delightful as the sweetest pumpkin pie!</flirty>
sensitive.dialogue.kiss.success/4: <flirty>Mmm! Your lips are as sweet as honey.</flirty>
sensitive.dialogue.kiss.success/6: <happy>%1$s, your kisses are even more enchanting than Ash's!</happy> *giggles*
sensitive.dialogue.kiss.fail/1: <nervous>I must insist on keeping our affection discreet, for fear of prying eyes.</nervous>
sensitive.dialogue.kiss.fail/2: <sad>Is that what you call a kiss? My dear, I'm afraid it fell quite short of my expectations.</sad>
sensitive.dialogue.kiss.fail/6: <nervous>Please, kindly remove yourself from my personal space.</nervous> I appreciate the sentiment, but physical contact is not my cup of tea.
sensitive.dialogue.chat.success/1: <happy>Oh my, the thought of warm, freshly baked cookies and a glass of cold milk is simply delightful!</happy>
sensitive.dialogue.chat.success/2: <happy>It's such a splendid day, isn't it? The sun is shining so beautifully.</happy>
sensitive.dialogue.chat.success/3: <sad>Oh dear, I had a rather unfortunate incident this morning. I accidentally stubbed my toe when I woke up. Ouch!</sad>
sensitive.dialogue.chat.success/7: <excited>Oh, you wouldn't believe the news!</excited> My dear friend %Supporter% stumbled upon a treasure chest brimming with magnificent diamonds just yesterday!
sensitive.dialogue.chat.success/13: <sad>Lately, I have been longing to provide a loving home to one of those charming stray cats that grace our village.</sad> Sadly, my busy schedule has hindered me.
sensitive.dialogue.chat.success/15: <sad>Ah, my heart desires to one day have children, but alas, I must first find the perfect partner to embark on that joyous journey with.</sad>
sensitive.dialogue.chat.success/17: <happy>There are moments when I find myself reminiscing about my childhood, cherishing all those delightful memories.</happy> <sad>Ah, such blissful times.</sad>
sensitive.dialogue.chat.success/18: <sad>It has been quite some time since I last conversed with my beloved parents. I truly ought to pay them a visit soon.</sad>
sensitive.dialogue.chat.success/19: <sad>I have been yearning to venture to the nearby village, where a few dear friends reside. It has been far too long since we last gathered.</sad>
sensitive.dialogue.chat.fail/1: <scared>Can you believe what just happened? It's hard for me to wrap my head around it.</scared>
sensitive.dialogue.chat.fail/7: <sad>Why do you keep coming back to talk to me? Can't you take a hint?</sad>
sensitive.dialogue.chat.fail/14: <scared>If you don't stop talking to me, I'll have no choice but to call for assistance to keep you away.</scared>
sensitive.dialogue.chat.fail/17: <sad>I wonder if anyone would even notice if you suddenly stopped talking forever.</sad>
sensitive.dialogue.story.success/1: <excited>Oh my goodness, I am absolutely astonished by everything that transpired!</excited>
sensitive.dialogue.story.success/2: <sad>If only I possessed the courage to confront a creeper, I truly envy your bravery.</sad>
sensitive.dialogue.story.success/3: <happy>Your storytelling is absolutely captivating!</happy> Is this an original masterpiece?
sensitive.dialogue.story.success/4: <excited>Hold on, all of this occurred just yesterday? I simply cannot fathom it!</excited>
sensitive.dialogue.story.success/6: <happy>Oh, how delightful! %Supporter% is undeniably a remarkable individual.</happy>
sensitive.dialogue.story.success/9: <excited>You must absolutely pay me a visit later!</excited> <happy>I would be absolutely thrilled to listen to more of your adventures.</happy>
sensitive.dialogue.story.fail/2: <sad>It's rather disheartening to witness the way the village gossips about you.</sad>
sensitive.dialogue.story.fail/4: <sad>You should know that your actions are deeply upsetting. Even the Creepers have emotions!</sad>
sensitive.dialogue.story.fail/5: <sad>It truly saddens me to witness the merciless slaughter of an innocent sheep. How could you?</sad>
sensitive.dialogue.story.fail/6: <sleepy>*yawning softly* Oh, I apologize, I must have dozed off.</sleepy> What were you saying?
sensitive.dialogue.flirt.success/2: <flirty>Oh my, you're just too charming for words!</flirty>
sensitive.dialogue.flirt.success/4: <flirty>Oh dear, my heart skipped a beat...</flirty>
sensitive.dialogue.flirt.success/5: <happy>That was absolutely precious!</happy> <flirty>You had my attention from the moment we met!</flirty>
sensitive.dialogue.flirt.success/6: <flirty>How is it possible for you to exude such beauty every single day?</flirty> <nervous>Whenever I see you, I'm rendered speechless.</nervous>
sensitive.dialogue.flirt.success/7: <flirty>Oh please, don't make me turn any redder!</flirty>
sensitive.dialogue.flirt.fail/2: <sad>Oh, dear... You know, you used that line on the blacksmith just yesterday.</sad>
sensitive.dialogue.flirt.fail/4: <sad>How sad. Do you really think that would work on me?</sad>
sensitive.dialogue.flirt.fail/7: <nervous>Please, spare me the awkwardness and never utter those words again.</nervous>
sensitive.dialogue.joke.creative.success: <excited>That's absolutely top-notch! I haven't heard anything better!</excited>
<excited>Oh my gosh, that was genuinely the funniest joke I've heard in ages!</excited> I can't stop laughing!
<happy>Teehee! You're definitely more hilarious than Ash, no doubt about it!</happy>
sensitive.dialogue.joke.creative.failed/: <sad>It's important to consider the impact of your words, humor shouldn't be at the expense of others.</sad>
<sad>Did you really think that joke was appropriate? It's not the kind of humor that resonates with me.</sad>
sensitive.dialogue.procreate_engaged/1: <flirty>My heart yearns for the sacred bond of matrimony before embarking on the beautiful journey of procreation.</flirty>
sensitive.dialogue.shake_hand.success/5: <happy>Well, hello! It's a pleasure to meet someone as charming as you.</happy>
sensitive.dialogue.shake_hand.fail/1: <angry>Are you serious? After you mercilessly butchered the poor cow?</angry>
sensitive.dialogue.shake_hand.fail/5: <sad>Perhaps it's best if you just leave me alone for now.</sad>
sensitive.dialogue.main.morning/3: <sleepy>I'm feeling a bit groggy, how about you?</sleepy>
sensitive.dialogue.main.morning/5: <sad>Looks like you didn't get much rest last night. Tough break.</sad>
sensitive.dialogue.main.morning/9: <excited>What a glorious morning! I have a feeling we'll accomplish great things today!</excited>
sensitive.dialogue.main.morning/10: <nervous>I might take it easy today, I'm feeling a bit delicate.</nervous>
sensitive.dialogue.main.morning/11: <sad>My schedule is jam-packed today, just thinking about it drains me.</sad>
sensitive.dialogue.main.evening/1: <happy>Good evening! I hope the day treated you well.</happy>
sensitive.dialogue.main.evening/6: <sad>Regrettably, I squandered precious hours today and accomplished very little.</sad>
sensitive.dialogue.main.evening/7: <sleepy>Fatigue weighs heavily upon me; I feel inclined to seek solace in a brief nap.</sleepy>
sensitive.dialogue.main.evening/8: <scared>Nightfall invokes a sense of trepidation within me. A creeper sighting last month has deterred me from venturing out after dark.</scared>
sensitive.dialogue.main.night/4: <nervous>Hey, just a friendly reminder to stick close to the village.</nervous> <scared>Wouldn't want those creepy crawlies to get their hands on you!</scared>
sensitive.dialogue.main.night/5: <nervous>You know, the guards do their best to keep the village safe, but there's still an undeniable eeriness to the night, don't you agree?</nervous>
sensitive.dialogue.main.night/6: <whisper>There's something so strangely calming about the darkness, isn't there? It almost feels like the world takes a deep breath and settles down.</whisper>
sensitive.dialogue.main.night/8: <sleepy>I don't know about you, but I'm absolutely knackered.</sleepy> Today has been a marathon, and I think I'll need to pace myself tomorrow.
sensitive.dialogue.main.night/9: <happy>Ahh, the thought of snuggling up under the covers is pure bliss, isn't it?</happy>
sensitive.dialogue.greet/5: <happy>Greetings, %1$s! It's a pleasure to lay eyes on you!</happy>
sensitive.dialogue.greet/9: <excited>Hey! I'm absolutely thrilled to see your lovely face!</excited> How have you been?
sensitive.dialogue.greet.negative/1: <angry>Ugh, please leave. You're the absolute last person I wanted to encounter right now!</angry>
sensitive.dialogue.greet.negative/4: <sad>Oh, it's you... I was kind of hoping for someone different, to be honest.</sad>
sensitive.dialogue.greet.success/1: <happy>That's wonderful news, I'm truly thrilled to hear it!</happy>
sensitive.dialogue.greet.success/2: <excited>Oh, how delightful! I'm absolutely ecstatic to hear that you're doing well!</excited>
sensitive.dialogue.greet.success/3: <happy>My heart is brimming with joy to know that you're in a good place!</happy>
sensitive.dialogue.greet.fail/5: <sad>Oh... well, that's a bit disappointing. I was hoping for something a little more exciting, but I'll manage.</sad>
sensitive.dialogue.apologize.fail/2: <sad>I can't believe you intentionally struck me!</sad>
sensitive.dialogue.apologize.fail/4: <angry>That really stung, so don't even bother trying to apologize!</angry>
sensitive.dialogue.apologize.fail/5: <angry>Sorry, but there's absolutely no chance I'll forgive you.</angry>
sensitive.dialogue.goaway/1: <sad>Please, I kindly request that you go away.</sad>
sensitive.dialogue.goaway/5: <nervous>Oh dear, would you be so kind as to leave, you miscreant?</nervous>
sensitive.dialogue.location.igloo/2: <scared>You won't believe what I discovered! There's this forsaken igloo at %2$s. No one seems to dwell there anymore, and honestly, I can't blame them.</scared> <whisper>It gives off an eerie vibe. I've even heard strange whispers whenever I pass by...</whisper>
sensitive.dialogue.location.pyramid/3: <nervous>Ah, my dear friend, if you venture forth to %2$s, you shall stumble upon a most intriguing pyramid.</nervous> <scared>A brave soul, not unlike yourself, set off on an exploration ages ago, but alas, they've not returned.</scared> Take heed of the dangers that lie ahead, my sensitive companion.
sensitive.dialogue.location.ruined_porta: <sad>Oh, dear, it's absolutely heart-wrenching to see what happened to the portal at %2$s.</sad> It's been utterly devastated by the Nether invasion.

<scared>If you happen to venture to %2$s, you'll come across a rather distressing sight - a ruined nether portal. It sends shivers down my spine, to be honest.</scared> But fear not, it should be safe. Just be cautious and avoid stepping on any dangerous magma.
sensitive.dialogue.location.mansion/1: <scared>Ah, my dear friend, I must warn you about the treacherous path that lies ahead. A wretched mansion looms ominously at %2$s, a place infested with vile illagers.</scared> I beseech you, if you cherish your existence, never venture anywhere near that cursed abode.
sensitive.dialogue.location.mansion/2: <scared>Have you heard of the magnificent mansion nestled at %2$s? Alas, it is under the unsavory ownership of those dreadful illagers.</scared> <nervous>Pardon my concern, but perhaps it would be wise for us to relocate the entire village, far away from this perilous vicinity... for our own safety, of course.</nervous>
sensitive.dialogue.location.monument/1: <whisper>Step closer, traveler, and lend me your ear.</whisper> <scared>Legends tell of ancient ruins nestled in the depths of the vast ocean, beckoning daring souls to uncover their secrets at %2$s. But be forewarned, my curious companion, for this endeavor is fraught with danger.</scared>
sensitive.dialogue.location.shipwreck/1: <sad>Oh, the poor shipwreck at %2$s breaks my heart.</sad> It was once a majestic vessel owned by the Eastern Alliance Company. Such a tragic tale it holds.
sensitive.dialogue.location.shipwreck/2: <sad>It deeply saddens me to hear that there's a shipwreck at %2$s.</sad> I've heard whispers of fishermen stumbling upon it, wondering if there's any precious treasure concealed within its watery depths.
sensitive.dialogue.location.pillager_out: <scared>Oh my, have you heard about the presence of those dreadful Pillagers at %2$s? They've established an outpost right next to us, and it's simply nerve-wracking.</scared> <nervous>I just hope and pray they won't launch another attack on us anytime soon. Our poor village cannot bear the thought of another assault.</nervous>

<scared>Oh dear, I must warn you about that wretched outpost occupied by those pillagers at %2$s. It's truly a nightmare!</scared> They make it impossible for us to get a peaceful night's rest. If you dare venture anywhere near there, please exercise extreme caution. Those heartless creatures shoot first and ask questions never.
sensitive.dialogue.location.ancient_city: <nervous>I couldn't help but sense some eerie vibrations coming from %2$s, deep within the earth.</nervous>
<whisper>My intuition tells me that there's a hidden secret buried beneath the surface of %2$s.</whisper>
<whisper>Whispers of an ancient city resonate through the stories, yet my eyes fail to witness its presence.</whisper> Perhaps it lies concealed beneath the ground at %2$s.
sensitive.dialogue.joke.monster.failed/1: <sad>It's really important to remember that skeletons, just like us, have feelings too!</sad> Let's show some respect, shall we?
sensitive.dialogue.joke.monster.failed/2: <sad>I must admit, I find it quite insensitive when people make jokes about creepers exploding.</sad> We should be more understanding towards their explosive tendencies, don't you think?
sensitive.dialogue.joke.monster.failed/3: <sad>Have you ever stopped to consider that zombies and skeletons were once humans with hopes and dreams?</sad> It's rather heartbreaking when you think about it. Let's be more compassionate towards them.
sensitive.dialogue.joke.animal.failed/1: <sad>Oh, please, let's not make light of the situation.</sad>
sensitive.dialogue.joke.animal.failed/2: <sad>It's disheartening to see humor at the expense of innocent animals.</sad>
sensitive.dialogue.joke.animal.failed/3: <sad>We should show compassion rather than finding amusement in such unfortunate circumstances.</sad>
sensitive.dialogue.joke.animal.failed/5: <sad>Making fun of animals, even in jest, can be hurtful. Let's refrain from doing so.</sad>
sensitive.dialogue.story.exploring.succe: <excited>Awesome! One day, I dream of embarking on my own epic journey across the vast lands of Minecraft!</excited>

<excited>My goodness!</excited> <sad>The mere thought of venturing out into the great unknown, discovering new horizons, and leaving my cozy village behind fills me with a mix of awe and envy.</sad> The world must be teeming with wonders waiting to be unveiled!

<excited>Oh my goodness, you must have the heart of a lion!</excited> To boldly step into uncharted territory, facing the mysteries and dangers that lie ahead takes a special kind of courage. I'm in absolute awe!
sensitive.dialogue.story.nether.success/: <scared>Is it really that hot in the Nether?!</scared> Oh, my delicate senses couldn't bear the scorching heat!
<scared>Oh, my goodness! How on earth have you managed to not spontaneously combust in that treacherous place?</scared> My fragile constitution would never survive!

<excited>You, my fearless friend, must possess nerves of steel!</excited> <scared>I can't even fathom the sheer terror one must feel when wandering through the Nether.</scared> Not that I would know anything about that, of course...

<nervous>Pardon me, good sir/madam, may I inquire if you have ever laid eyes upon a Zombified Piglin?</nervous> <scared>The mere thought of encountering such a creature sends shivers down my spine!</scared>
sensitive.dialogue.story.enderdragon.suc: <excited>Astounding! And pray tell, doth thou possess the dragon egg in thy possession?</excited>
<excited>Oh gracious me! Hath thou truly vanquished the formidable dragon of lore?!</excited> The village shall forever regale thy heroic feats!
sensitive.dialogue.story.wither.success/: <excited>Unbelievable! The tales of the Wither's destructive power are beyond comprehension!</excited>
<excited>You've managed to overcome the indomitable Wither?!</excited> Oh my, that's absolutely mind-blowing!
sensitive.dialogue.stay.success/1: <happy>Many thanks! I am absolutely delighted to make this village my home!</happy>
sensitive.dialogue.stay.success/2: <excited>Oh, how splendid! This village is simply marvelous, and I cannot wait to settle down here!</excited>
sensitive.dialogue.stay.no_space/2: <sad>I do have a slight inclination to remain here, but regrettably, there seems to be a shortage of available resting quarters.</sad>
sensitive.dialogue.kiss.slap/1: <angry>I cannot believe you would do such a thing!</angry>
sensitive.dialogue.kiss.slap/2: <angry>If you even think about attempting that again, I promise you, the consequences will be far from pleasant!</angry>
sensitive.dialogue.chat.plains/1: <happy>Oh, how I adore the plains!</happy> It's the only place I've ever known, but I dream of venturing beyond its borders one day... to see the world!
sensitive.dialogue.chat.plains/3: <happy>Oh, when the sun sets and blankets the plains in its golden hues, it's a sight that takes my breath away.</happy> <whisper>And the gentle whispers of the wind... it's like nature's lullaby.</whisper>
sensitive.dialogue.chat.plains/7: <happy>Ah, memories of picking wildflowers as a child flood my heart with nostalgia.</happy> <flirty>I must confess, I would gather them with the hope of catching the eye of my childhood crush, Ash. Oh, young love!</flirty>
sensitive.dialogue.chat.snowy_plains/1: <nervous>Brrr, this cold weather really gets to me.</nervous> As long as I have a cozy fireplace and a warm cup of cocoa, I can survive!
sensitive.dialogue.chat.snowy_plains/4: <happy>When the snow falls, it's like a magical time machine transporting me back to the days of snow angels and building massive igloos.</happy> Ah, the nostalgia!
sensitive.dialogue.chat.snowy_plains/5: <angry>Ugh, those pesky strays are such a pain, always ruining my peaceful walks with their annoying arrows.</angry> Can't they find a different hobby?
sensitive.dialogue.chat.snowy_plains/6: <scared>Watch out for the wolves lurking around, I've heard they're particularly hungry these days.</scared> Stay safe, my friend!
sensitive.dialogue.chat.desert/5: <scared>Whoa, hold onto your hats! The sun is giving us its fiercest glare today.</scared> I'll be a molten mess if I stay out too long!
sensitive.dialogue.rock_paper_scissor.lo: <sad>Oh no, I picked rock! You win fair and square!</sad>
sensitive.dialogue.rock_paper_scissor.wi: <sad>Oh my, the scissor has been crushed by the unstoppable force of the rock. I've lost this round.</sad>
<sad>Winning with rock? A distant dream for me. It's a constant reminder of my lack of fortune in this game.</sad>
<nervous>I'd feel more confident with a cleaver in hand.</nervous>
<nervous>I'd feel awful ruining the hide. A skinning knife would help.</nervous>
<nervous>I'd hate to break a good cleaver on iron. A hacksaw would be kinder.</nervous>
<nervous>It bothers me to leave blood everywhere. A sponge or rag would help.</nervous>
